prompt: A dark, ornate, Pre-Raphaelite-inspired portrait of a red-haired anime heroine standing front-facing in a dense cathedral garden, wearing a glossy red futuristic plug suit with black and dark blue paneling and small green chest accents. She has very long, slightly tousled auburn hair with two subtle red hair clips near the crown, pale skin, and a solemn, devotional pose: one hand resting over her chest and the other loosely holding a small bouquet of white lilies downward. Behind her head is a large circular stained-glass halo with intricate gold tracery, blue and ruby jewel tones, and star motifs, creating the effect of a saint icon. The background is packed with climbing vines, deep crimson roses, blooming white lilies, antique brass candleholders, and a faint statue-like female figure recessed on the right side. The composition is centered, symmetrical, and waist-to-thigh portrait framing, with rich oil-painting texture, moody chiaroscuro lighting, aged varnish tones, high detail, gothic floral decoration, sacred-art atmosphere, and an elegant fusion of anime mecha design and medieval religious iconography.
